issues.description: Effect is missing the [Once Per Turn] condition. Should include 'oncePerTurn: true' or equivalent constraint.

Action only models trashing from hand with Celestial Dragons filter. Card text states 'trash 1 of your Celestial Dragons type Characters OR 1 card from your hand' — this is an OR condition with two separate paths, not a single filtered action. Must model both options.
Trigger should be 'Activated' with activation context '[Main]' — trigger is correct but activation type/phase context not fully encoded in DSL structure.
